title: Capability vs Readiness
prompt: Explain why a technically capable system may not be ready for responsible deployment.

title: AI Agent Boundaries
prompt: Define permissions, confirmations, logs, rollback, and prohibited actions.

title: Human Judgment
prompt: Design meaningful human review with authority, time, evidence, training, and override power.

title: Contestability
prompt: Create notice, reason, appeal, and correction pathways for affected people.

title: No-Go Criteria
prompt: Identify when an algorithmic system should be delayed, redesigned, limited, or refused.
